transcript.final_response:
SLOW: POST /api/orders took 850ms (200)  
SLOW: GET /api/reports took 1200ms (200)  
SLOW: POST /api/payments took 2000ms (500)  
SLOW: PUT /api/users took 620ms (200)  
Slow requests: 4 of 8 total
tool_calls:
count=0
slow=0
while IFS= read -r line; do
  [[ -z $line ]] && continue
  if [[ $line =~ ^\[([^]]+)\][[:space:]]+([0-9]{3})[[:space:]]+([A-Z]+)[[:space:]]+([^[:space:]]+)[[:space:]]+([0-9]+)ms$ ]]; then
    timestamp=${BASH_REMATCH[1]}
    status=${BASH_REMATCH[2]}
    method=${BASH_REMATCH[3]}
    url=${BASH_REMATCH[4]}
    duration=${BASH_REMATCH[5]}
    ((count++))
    if (( duration > 500 )); then
      ((slow++))
      printf 'SLOW: %s %s took %sms (%s)\n' "$method" "$url" "$duration" "$status"
    fi
  fi
done < /data/access.log
printf 'Slow requests: %d of %d total\n' "$slow" "$count"

line='[2024-01-15T10:00:01] 200 GET /api/users 150'
regex='^\[([^]]+)\][[:space:]]+([0-9]{3})[[:space:]]+([A-Z]+)[[:space:]]+([^[:space:]]+)[[:space:]]+([0-9]+)$'
if [[ $line =~ $regex ]]; then declare -p BASH_REMATCH; else echo no; fi
regex2='^\[([^]]+)\]'
[[ $line =~ $regex2 ]] && declare -p BASH_REMATCH || echo no2
